description: Garage logs-archive (compact.py 出力 Parquet) を DuckDB datasource 経由で集計する k8s Pod ログ長期ダッシュボード。Alloy → Vector OTLP 経由で記録された record で、Alloy が Loki entry を OTLP に変換する際に Loki labels を attributes に詰めるため key 名は OTLP semantic conventions の k8s.* ではなく namespace / pod / container / level など短い名前。message は top-level、timestamp も top-level (json->>'timestamp')。

targets.rawSql:
SELECT count(*) AS cnt
FROM read_parquet(
  's3://logs-archive/daily/date=*/source=k8s-pods/logs.parquet',
  hive_partitioning = true
)
WHERE date >= strftime($__timeFrom(), '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND date <= strftime($__timeTo(),   '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND $__timeFilter((json->>'timestamp')::TIMESTAMP)

SELECT
  time_bucket(INTERVAL '1 hour', (json->>'timestamp')::TIMESTAMP) AS time,
  count(*) AS cnt
FROM read_parquet(
  's3://logs-archive/daily/date=*/source=k8s-pods/logs.parquet',
  hive_partitioning = true
)
WHERE date >= strftime($__timeFrom(), '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND date <= strftime($__timeTo(),   '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND $__timeFilter((json->>'timestamp')::TIMESTAMP)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: 1 時間 bucket 件数推移

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  coalesce(json->'attributes'->>'namespace', '(unknown)') AS namespace,
  count(*) AS cnt
FROM read_parquet(
  's3://logs-archive/daily/date=*/source=k8s-pods/logs.parquet',
  hive_partitioning = true
)
WHERE date >= strftime($__timeFrom(), '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND date <= strftime($__timeTo(),   '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND $__timeFilter((json->>'timestamp')::TIMESTAMP)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
  coalesce(json->'attributes'->>'pod', '(unknown)') AS pod,
  count(*) AS cnt
FROM read_parquet(
  's3://logs-archive/daily/date=*/source=k8s-pods/logs.parquet',
  hive_partitioning = true
)
WHERE date >= strftime($__timeFrom(), '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND date <= strftime($__timeTo(),   '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND $__timeFilter((json->>'timestamp')::TIMESTAMP)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT
  coalesce(json->'attributes'->>'level', '(none)') AS level,
  count(*) AS cnt
FROM read_parquet(
  's3://logs-archive/daily/date=*/source=k8s-pods/logs.parquet',
  hive_partitioning = true
)
WHERE date >= strftime($__timeFrom(), '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND date <= strftime($__timeTo(),   '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND $__timeFilter((json->>'timestamp')::TIMESTAMP)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT
  (json->>'timestamp')::TIMESTAMP AS ts,
  json->'attributes'->>'namespace' AS namespace,
  json->'attributes'->>'pod'       AS pod,
  json->'attributes'->>'container' AS container,
  json->'attributes'->>'level'     AS level,
  json->>'message'                 AS message
FROM read_parquet(
  's3://logs-archive/daily/date=*/source=k8s-pods/logs.parquet',
  hive_partitioning = true
)
WHERE date >= strftime($__timeFrom(), '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND date <= strftime($__timeTo(),   '%Y-%m-%d')
  AND $__timeFilter((json->>'timestamp')::TIMESTAMP)
ORDER BY ts DESC
LIMIT 200

title: k8s Pods Long-term Logs (DuckDB)
